modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error saving attachments in Xtender due to authorization issue.

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to save attachments in Xtender while using Banner, but I keep getting an error. The message says I can't update the document index because I'm not authorized with the VPDI Code. This happens when I try to attach documents, and it’s really frustrating since I need to save these files.
short_description: Error saving attachments in Xtender due to authorization issue.
description: I'm trying to save attachments in Xtender while using Banner, but I keep getting an error. The message says I can't update the document index because I'm not authorized with the VPDI Code. This happens when I try to attach documents, and it’s really frustrating since I need to save these files.
